name: Garlic Soup with Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole head garlic, broken into cloves
recipeInstructions:
1. Make fresh chicken broth by simmering the chicken, carrots, celery, onion, garlic, parsley, salt, and pepper in enough water to cover.
2. When the chicken is thoroughly cooked, remove it and skim the fat from the broth.
3. Simmer the broth, reducing it until it is very rich.
4. Remove the unpeeled garlic cloves; squeeze the cooked garlic from the cloves and mash to make a puree. Discard the skins.
5. In a frying pan, sauté the 10 peeled garlic cloves in butter until lightly browned.
6. Add flour and a small amount of broth to the pan, mixing with a wire whisk until velvety.
7. Pour this mixture into the remaining broth and stir in the garlic puree.
8. Tear the chicken into bite-sized pieces and add it to the soup.
9. Sprinkle with fresh parsley and serve.
